info.title: synctool
info.description: Command line tool that sync files and folders recursively

commands.name: sync
commands.description: Syncronize folders, adding, deleting and updating files

options.name: --help
options.description:
Show this screen
Install/Uninstall tool:
> To install tool from system
dotnet tool install -g synctool
> To uninstall tool from system
dotnet tool uninstall -g synctool
